name: json-table-x
description: Render arbitrary JSON into nested HTML tables with layout, i18n and styling options.

scripts.build: npm run build:prep && terser src/json-table-x.js -c --mangle -o dist/json-table-x.min.js && npm run build:css
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,open "sh -c 'npm run build && http-server . -p 8000 -c-1'" "sleep 1 && echo 'Open: http://127.0.0.1:8000/demo/' && open http://127.0.0.1:8000/demo/"
